verdict.description: pass = no material issues; concerns = works but has risks worth addressing; fail = has blocking defects

summary.description: 2-4 sentence independent assessment of the artifact under review

findings.description: Specific issues, risks, or recommendations. Empty array if none.

detail.description: What the issue is and why it matters

location.description: File path / line / component, or null if not applicable

recommendation.description: Concrete suggested fix, or null if none
